name: ENHANCED MASTER Job Automation System (with Resume Intelligence)

nodes.name: Append to Google Sheets: Jobs Tab

parameters.subject: 📊 Daily Job Discovery - {{ $json.total }} New Jobs

nodes.name: Read Jobs from Sheet for Outreach
Filter: Status=New AND Has Recruiter Email
nodes.notes:
HOW RECRUITER EMAILS WORK:

Job APIs do NOT provide recruiter emails. You must manually fill the 
'Recruiter Email' column in your Google Sheet for jobs you want to apply to.

Workflow: 
1. Job Discovery (8 AM) populates jobs with scores
2. YOU review the Sheet, find recruiter emails (LinkedIn, company site, Hunter.io)
3. YOU fill 'Recruiter Email' column for good matches
4. Email Outreach (9 AM) picks up rows with Status=New AND Recruiter Email filled
5. AI generates personalized email with resume attached and sends

This is intentional: targeted emails to researched contacts = professional networking.

parameters.subject: ✅ Email Outreach Complete - {{ $json.total }} Emails Sent
parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $('User Config (Master Profile)').item.json.name }},

Your daily email outreach campaign has completed!

**Email Account Breakdown:**
📧 Account 1 (raviintouch2@gmail.com): {{ $json.account1Count }} emails sent
📧 Account 2 (ravitejavallakatla7@gmail.com): {{ $json.account2Count }} emails sent
📧 Account 3 (ravitejav081@gmail.com): {{ $json.account3Count }} emails sent
📧 Account 4 (ravitejav0801@gmail.com): {{ $json.account4Count }} emails sent

**Total Emails Sent:** {{ $json.total }}
**Total Daily Capacity:** 200 emails/day (50 per account × 4 accounts)

**Sent To:**
{{ $json.sentList }}

All applications have been logged in your Google Sheet with status "Email Sent".

Check your Gmail Sent folder for copies (you were CC'd on all emails).

**Date:** {{ $json.date }}

Best regards,
Email Outreach System

values.url: ={{ (() => { const url = $('User Config (Master Profile)').item.json.resumeUrl || ''; if (url.includes('drive.google.com/file/d/')) { const match = url.match(/\/d\/([^\/]+)/); if (match) return 'https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=' + match[1]; } return url; })() }}
